---
title: "Ahlan to Affluent Ammar's Almanac!"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: gimme.png
  links:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/ammaraldawood
        target: _blank
      - icon: linkedin
        href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ammar-aldawood/
        target: _blank
      - icon: twitter-x
        href: https://x.com/aldawood_ammar
        target: _blank
      - icon: youtube
        href: https://www.youtube.com/@Ammar_Aldawood
        target: _blank
      - icon: envelope-at-fill
        href: mailto:aldawoodammar@gmail.com
        target: _blank
---
